entries.title: Use connection pooling for all database access
entries.body: All services should use the shared connection pool via db.getPool(). This prevents connection exhaustion under load. The pool is configured in src/db/pool.ts with max 20 connections.

entries.title: Always use shared DB connections instead of per-request connections
entries.body: Individual database connections caused the connection limit to be hit during load testing. Services must import the shared connection from db.getPool() rather than creating new connections.
